testcase.name: AdminTeam > renders shared surface banner feedback
AdminTenants > renders shared surface banner feedback
Comments > renders shared surface feedback through the page shell
Executions durable surface > renders summary, detail, and manual retry flow
Executions durable surface > shows honest loading and error states
Inbox > renders shared page shell feedback
Voice > renders shared banner state through the admin shell
AdminPageShell > renders page metadata, shared banners, and header actions
InboxComposer > renders explicit composer surface feedback
InboxDetailPanel > renders explicit detail surface feedback
InboxLeadPanel > renders explicit lead surface feedback
InboxThreadListPanel > renders explicit thread list surface data
RetryQueuePanel > renders shared banner feedback
ThreadOutboundAttemptsPanel > renders shared banner feedback
ChannelsPanel > renders shared surface banner feedback for channel async state
SecretsPanel > renders shared surface banner feedback for admin secret async state
SecretsPanel > renders provider secret access as read-only for insufficient roles
SettingsSurfaceBanner > renders save feedback and unavailable refresh affordances consistently
TeamPanel > renders shared surface banner feedback for team async state
Settings truth-maintenance smoke > renders workspace and business-brain sections through the shared async surface language
Settings truth-maintenance smoke > renders source sync and knowledge review truth-maintenance messaging

Unable to find an element with the text: /source-derived truth changes are reviewed, conflicted, quarantined, approved, or rejected here/i. This could be because the text is broken up by multiple elements. In this case, you can provide a function for your text matcher to make your matcher more flexible. testcase.name: Settings truth-maintenance smoke > renders operational readiness fail states honestly

testcase.name: Truth viewer smoke > renders approved truth metadata, provenance, and history
Truth viewer smoke > shows an explicit approved truth unavailable state without fallback data
Truth viewer smoke > renders safely when governance and runtime telemetry are partial
Truth viewer smoke > opens a deep-linked truth version from remediation navigation

testcase.failure:
TestingLibraryElementError: Unable to find an element with the text: /version detail/i. This could be because the text is broken up by multiple elements. In this case, you can provide a function for your text matcher to make your matcher more flexible. Ignored nodes: comments, script, style
Governed Truth

Business truth

This is the current approved business twin and its governed execution context. Approval, provenance, runtime health, and repair posture are shown honestly when they are available and fail closed when they are not.

Approved at
2026-03-25T10:00:00.000Z
Approved by
reviewer@aihq.test
Version
approved
Governed Control Plane
Truth Governance Cockpit
Approved truth, runtime projection health, finalize impact, and repairability are shown together so operators can understand the full governed execution path.
Governed Truth

Business truth

This is the current approved business twin and its governed execution context. Approval, provenance, runtime health, and repair posture are shown honestly when they are available and fail closed when they are not.

Approved at
2026-03-25T10:00:00.000Z
Approved by
reviewer@aihq.test
Version
approved
Governed Control Plane
Truth Governance Cockpit
Approved truth, runtime projection health, finalize impact, and repairability are shown together so operators can understand the full governed execution path.

testcase.name: Truth viewer smoke > shows a publish receipt after approving a reviewed candidate
Truth viewer smoke > executes governed rollback from truth compare and shows the receipt
TrustMaintenanceSection > renders trust repair state and dispatches route actions from the extracted section
